case_title: ARROW FINANCIAL SERVICES ASSIGNEE OF PROVIDIAN VS. CAROL L JONES et al

docket_entries.description: ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF ARROW FINANCIAL SERVICES ASSIGNEE OF PROVIDIAN NATIONAL BANK
NOTICE OF CHANGE OF FIRM NAME FILED BY ATTORNEY BRACHFELD, ERICA L
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: WALSH, MARK D SUBSTITUTED FOR BRACHFELD, ERICA L AS ATTORNEY FOR ARROW FINANCIAL SERVICES ASSIGNEE OF PROVIDIAN NATIONAL BANK

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ARROW FINANCIAL SERVICES ASSIGNEE OF PROVIDIAN NATIONAL BANK AS TO DEFENDANT JONES, CAROL L DOES 1 TO 100, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUN-02-2009
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ARROW FINANCIAL SERVICES ASSIGNEE OF PROVIDIAN NATIONAL BANK SERVED JAN-06-2009, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT JONES, CAROL L
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JAN-27-2010 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $247.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT JONES, CAROL L
DECLARATION ERICA L. BRACHFELD FILED RE: CALCULATION OF INTEREST & WAIVER OF ATTORNEY FEES FILED BY PLAINTIFF ARROW FINANCIAL SERVICES ASSIGNEE OF PROVIDIAN NATIONAL BANK

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ARROW FINANCIAL SERVICES ASSIGNEE OF PROVIDIAN NATIONAL BANK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JONES, CAROL L $5,348.37 PRINCIPAL, $149.46 INTEREST, $247.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,744.83, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JAN-27-2010 IS OFF CALENDAR JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT --CAUSE OF ACTION--BREACH OF CONTRACT-- AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 100, INCLUSIVE
